name: wio
description: Testing workflow skill for high-value test discovery, strategy selection, focused implementation, realistic workload generation, strict review, and suite health diagnostics.

interface.shortDescription: Write better tests, not more tests.
interface.longDescription: @workersio/skills gives coding agents a rigorous testing workflow for discovering valuable test candidates, choosing the right strategy, writing focused tests, generating realistic replayable workloads, reviewing test value with KEEP/REDO/REMOVE decisions, and diagnosing suite health.
